allow: Bash(awk 'NF==0{c++;next}{if\(c>=2\)print NR-1": "c" blank lines before line "NR; c=0}' index.template.html)
Bash(sed -i 's#<section class="section section-alt" id="features">#<section class="section" id="features">#' index.template.html)
Bash(sed -i 's#<section class="section" id="scenarios">#<section class="section section-alt" id="scenarios">#' index.template.html)
Bash(sed -i 's#<section class="section section-alt" id="issues">#<section class="section" id="issues">#' index.template.html)
Bash(sed -i 's#<section class="section" id="agents">#<section class="section section-alt" id="agents">#' index.template.html)
Bash(sed -i 's#<section class="section section-alt" id="quickstart">#<section class="section" id="quickstart">#' index.template.html)
